summary: Fair‑quality recording of an incomplete, hypnotic show with standout drum/space sections.
review: The tape captures a set that isn’t complete and fizzles in places, but the drum and space excursions are described as awesome and worth listening to. Listeners enjoy the hypnotic vibe despite occasional lapses, and the overall impression is mixed rather than wholly positive.

ai_rating.rationale: Only a single 3‑star review; reviewer notes both positives (drums/space) and negatives (incomplete show, fizzles), leading to an average rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No explicit comments on soundboard or audience quality; reviewer mentions occasional fizzles and that the recording is not a complete show.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The set runs through several tunes (Corrina, Drumz, INAM, Days, Throwing Stones, Love Light) but is not a full concert; drums and space sections are highlighted as the high points.

band_member_comments.Drums: Awesome drum/space segment praised by reviewer
